71042c5b.description: PM agent v2 — orphaned intake, backlog to assign, blocked with reply, or epic complete?

checks.name: unprocessed-requests
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:request --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:request --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: unprocessed-bugs
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do count=$(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:bug --state open --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select(.labels | map(.name) | all(test("^status:") | not))] | length'); if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; echo 0

checks.name: backlog-ready-to-assign
checks.command: in_prog_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label 'type:epic,status:in-progress' --state open --json number --jq 'length') && in_prog_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label 'type:epic,status:in-progress' --state open --json number --jq 'length') && if [ "$((in_prog_fe + in_prog_be))" -gt 0 ]; then echo 0; exit 0; fi && bl_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && bl_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $((bl_fe + bl_be))

checks.name: blocked-with-reply
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label status:blocked --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do has_human=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num/comments --jq '[.[] | select(.user.login | IN("sparkIQ-scrum","dolalde-sparkiq") | not)] | length'); if [ "$has_human" -gt 0 ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: epic-completed
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --label status:in-progress --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do result=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq 'if .sub_issues_summary.total > 0 and .sub_issues_summary.completed == .sub_issues_summary.total then 1 else 0 end'); if [ "$result" = "1" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0
